pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather than a co-payment amount will not have a 
value in this field; reference instead the corresponding coinsurance variable called 
(PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_1M). 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The mail order pharmacies are 
currently referred to as standard mail order pharmacies.
